2604.07070.title: EVGeoQA: Benchmarking LLMs on Dynamic, Multi-Objective Geo-Spatial Exploration
2604.07070.paper_summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable reasoning capabilities, their potential for purpose-driven exploration in dynamic geo-spatial environments remains under-investigated. Existing Geo-Spatial Question Answering (GSQA) benchmarks predominantly focus on static retrieval, failing to capture the complexity of real-world planning that involves dynamic user locations and compound constraints. To bridge this gap, we introduce EVGeoQA, a novel benchmark built upon Electric Vehicle (EV) charging scenarios that features a distinct location-anchored and dual-objective design. Specifically, each query in EVGeoQA is explicitly bound to a user's real-time coordinate and integrates the dual objectives of a charging necessity and a co-located activity preference. To systematically assess models in such complex settings, we further propose GeoRover, a general evaluation framework based on a tool-augmented agent architecture to evaluate the LLMs' capacity for dynamic, multi-objective exploration. Our experiments reveal that while LLMs successfully utilize tools to address sub-tasks, they struggle with long-range spatial exploration. Notably, we observe an emergent capability: LLMs can summarize historical exploration trajectories to enhance exploration efficiency. These findings establish EVGeoQA as a challenging testbed for future geo-spatial intelligence. The dataset and prompts are available at https://github.com/Hapluckyy/EVGeoQA/.
2604.07070.paper_summary_zh: 雖然大型語言模型（LLMs）展現出卓越的推理能力，但它們在動態地理空間環境中進行目的導向探索的潛力仍然未被充分研究。現有的地理空間問答（GSQA）基準主要集中在靜態檢索，未能捕捉到涉及動態用戶位置和複合約束的現實規劃的複雜性。為了填補這一空白，我們引入了EVGeoQA，這是一個基於電動車（EV）充電場景的新基準，具有獨特的地點錨定和雙重目標設計。具體而言，EVGeoQA中的每個查詢都明確綁定於用戶的實時坐標，並整合了充電需求和共同活動偏好的雙重目標。為了系統性地評估模型在這種複雜環境中的表現，我們進一步提出了GeoRover，一個基於工具增強代理架構的通用評估框架，用於評估LLMs在動態、多目標探索中的能力。我們的實驗顯示，雖然LLMs成功利用工具來解決子任務，但它們在長距離空間探索方面卻面臨挑戰。值得注意的是，我們觀察到一種新興能力：LLMs可以總結歷史探索軌跡以提高探索效率。這些發現確立了EVGeoQA作為未來地理空間智能的挑戰性測試平台。數據集和提示可在 https://github.com/Hapluckyy/EVGeoQA/ 獲得。
2604.07070.author: Jianfei Wu et.al.
2604.07070.authors: Jianfei Wu, Zhichun Wang, Zhensheng Wang, Zhiyu He
